docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,225.81 FILED BY YANG, JICI AKA JESSE YANG AS TO DEFENDANT SCHINDLER, JACK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-09-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $85.00 SERVED FEB-26-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SCHINDLER, JACK
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF YANG, JICI AKA JESSE YANG
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF YANG, JICI AKA JESSE YANG
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO: JICI YANG FOR SERVICE ON: THOMAS ERIK NIELSEN
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-09-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-09-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JICI YANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JACK SCHINDLER IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-09-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YANG, JICI AKA JESSE YANG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCHINDLER, JACK $5,763.10 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,898.10 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
